title: alpina Dough Scoop - for Accurate Dosage of Caramel - 900 ml - 10 x 20 cm
features: Portioner – you fill the dough dispenser with a thin dough of your choice, which can be easily distributed.
Dosing bottle – by pressing the lever, you can use the dough bottle as a dough sprayer.
900 ml - The dough dispenser has a generous capacity of 900 ml.
description: This dough dispenser from alpina is your baking aid in the kitchen. Ideal for precise measuring of thin dough, e.g. for pancakes, muffins and waffles. The dosing bottle has a capacity of 900 ml. By pressing the lever, the dough bottle becomes a dough syringe. Specifications alpina dough scoop Capacity: 900 ml. Dimensions: 10 x 20 cm.
